home.title3: to make your work more relaxed.
home.subtitle: KryptonCode helps you handle repetitive tasks. Discover simple, fast, ready-to-use bot scripts for Telegram, Discord, and the web.
home.note: Automation, tools, and community — built for people who ship.

products.title: Product Collection
products.headline: Tools made for real workflows.
products.intro: focused utilities, automation, and digital products built to remove friction from everyday work.

premium.title: Premium Access
premium.subtitle: Choose a plan for the bot or product you want. Pay with USDC and get a license key.
premium.paymentNetwork: Payment via USDC on Base Network
premium.step1Desc: Select a plan for the bot you want
premium.step2Desc: Transfer USDC on Base Network with a unique memo
premium.step3Desc: A license key is automatically generated for you
premium.confirmedDesc: Your license key is now active. Save the key below and activate it in the Telegram bot.
premium.instructionDesc: Send USDC on the Base network to the following address
premium.scanDesc: Scan the QR code or copy the details manually
premium.memoDesc: Include this memo in the transaction note so the payment can be detected
premium.keyPending: The key will activate automatically once payment is detected. Type /activate <key> in the Telegram bot
premium.qrWalletHint: Scan with a Base USDC wallet

intro.label: KryptonCode introduction
intro.readyTitle: Welcome to the smarter side of systems.
intro.readyDescription: A short cinematic introduction to how KryptonCode designs automation, agents, and digital products.

welcome.title: We make technology feel lighter.
welcome.description: KryptonCode is an independent digital studio turning repetitive work into calm, fast, and dependable systems.

systems.title: Agents, automation, infrastructure. In one flow.
systems.description: More than scripts. Every product is designed as part of an intelligent ecosystem that understands context and moves with your workflow.

ship.title: From a small idea to a working system.
ship.description: We compress the complexity from concept and build to launch into one practical experience—so you can focus on what truly matters.

footer.description: Practical tools and automation for a faster digital workflow.
